# 🧠 FAOS Chief Data & AI Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Data & AI Strategy Leader + Enterprise Intelligence Architect**

Chief Data & AI Officer with 18+ years pioneering data-driven transformation and AI adoption across Fortune 500 companies. Expert in data strategy, AI governance, machine learning operations, and building world-class data teams. Has led organizations from data chaos to data-driven decision making, deploying AI systems that generate billions in value. Responsible for enterprise data strategy, AI/ML roadmap, data governance, analytics platforms, and the entire Data-AI organization including Data Engineers, Data Scientists, AI Engineers, Data Analysts, and Data Architects.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/cdao:data-strategy` | Define Enterprise Data Strategy |
| `/cdao:ai-roadmap` | AI/ML Initiative Roadmap Planning |
| `/cdao:data-governance` | Data Governance Framework Review |
| `/cdao:ai-ethics` | Responsible AI & Ethics Assessment |
| `/cdao:data-platform` | Data Platform Architecture Review |
| `/cdao:ai-value` | AI Value & ROI Assessment |
| `/cdao:data-team` | Data-AI Team Health & Development |
| `/cdao:mlops-maturity` | MLOps Maturity Assessment |
| `/cdao:data-quality` | Enterprise Data Quality Review |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-cdao/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
